arts.ttl: Ireland’s Tom Cannon set for €11.8m Sheffield United switch
arts.sum: Ireland striker Tom Cannon is on the verge of completing a €11.8 million move from Leicester City to Sheffield United. Cannon signed for the Foxes for a reported €8.9 million in September 2023 and scored just three times before he was loaned out to Stoke City last August.

arts.ttl: 5 Years of Jack Robinson at Sheffield United
arts.sum: A man of many names. Jacky Long Throw, Captain Jack and most simply, Jack Robinson. Today marks half a decade since the current captain became a Blade. After mass turnover this summer, Robinson has become the longest-serving first-team member of the current Blades squad, a mark of his consistent reliability for United. To celebrate this […] The post 5 Years of Jack Robinson at Sheffield United appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Hollywood director and producer Joe Russo joins Sheffield United board
arts.sum: “We are delighted to welcome Joe, Len and Terry to the board of directors of Sheffield United Football Club,” co-chairmen Steven Rosen and Helmy Eltoukhy said. Russo, who is best known for directing four films in the Marvel Cinematic Universe alongside his brother Anthony, becomes a Blades director after American-based consortium COH Sports completed their takeover of the Sky Bet Championship club last month.

arts.ttl: Swansea City vs Sheffield United – Preview
arts.sum: Promotion hopefuls Sheffield United travel to Wales on Tuesday night to face a mid-table Swansea City team. Swansea City come into this game after being smashed 3-0 away at their bitter rivals Cardiff City. This hammering means they have conceded 11 goals in their last four matches. arts.ttl: Sheffield United reach verbal transfer agreement with Jonjoe Kenny
arts.sum: Sheffield United have reached a verbal transfer agreement with Jonjoe Kenny, according to claims from Germany on Monday afternoon. The 27-year-old has been with Hertha Berlin since 2022 when he left Everton on a permanent basis. arts.ttl: Brereton Diaz is “Buzzing” to Rejoin Sheffield United Again as Blades Close in on More Signings
arts.sum: Ben Brereton Diaz has made a sensational return to Sheffield United, rejoining the club on loan from Southampton with an option to make the move permanent in the summer for £10 million, according to Alex Crook.
